EmailTemplate.name: EOI Cancellation Complete - Customer
EmailTemplate.subject: EOI Cancellation
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!CustomerName},
This is with reference to your "Expression of Interest" cancellation request. Kindly note that your EOI has been cancelled in our system.
We look forward to serving you soon again. You may call on {!SMPhoneNumber} for any assistance.
Regards, Runwal Group
